item.title: Koodo Reader
item.description: A modern ebook manager and reader with sync and backup capacities for Windows, macOS, Linux and Web

item.title: AppFlowy
item.description: Open-source alternative to Notion. You are in charge of your data and customizations

item.title: Anytype
item.description: Anytype is a personal knowledge base

item.title: Cryptomator
item.description: Multi-platform transparent client-side encryption of your files in the cloud

item.title: Standard Notes
item.description: End-to-end encrypted note-taking app for digitalists and professionals

item.title: Notesnook
item.description: End-to-end encrypted note taking alternative to Evernote.

item.title: QOwnNotes
item.description: Open source notepad with Markdown support and todo list manager for GNU/Linux

item.title: Sleek
item.description: Open-source (FOSS) todo manager based on the todo.txt syntax

item.title: Siyuan
item.description: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software.

item.title: Lunatask
item.description: All-in-one encrypted to-do list, habit and mood tracker, journaling and notes app

item.title: Mendeley
item.description: Mendeley Reference Manager simplifies your workflow, so you can focus on achieving your goals

item.title: Scribus
item.description: Powerful desktop publishing software

item.title: authme
item.description: Simple cross-platform two-factor (2FA) authenticator app for desktop.

item.title: Beaver Notes
item.description: Privacy-focused note-taking application

item.title: Zettlr
item.description: Your One-Stop Publication Workbench

item.title: WonderPen
item.description: WonderPen is a professional writing app with a focused and fluid writing experience.

item.title: LibreOffice
item.description: Free open source office suite

item.title: Logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration

item.title: Saber
item.description: Cross-platform libre handwritten notes app

item.title: Joplin
item.description: The secure note taking and to-do app with synchronisation capabilities

item.title: Xournal++
item.description: Handwriting notetaking software with PDF annotation support

item.title: Butterfly
item.description: Powerful, minimalistic, cross-platform, opensource note-taking app

item.title: OnlyOffice
item.description: Free office suite that combines text, spreadsheet and presentation editors

item.title: AFFiNE
item.description: A privacy-focused, local-first, open-source, and ready-to-use alternative for Notion & Miro

item.title: KOReader
item.description: An ebook reader application

item.title: Advanced PassGen
item.description: Free and open-source application that can help you generate passwords and export them

item.title: Obsidian
item.description: Obsidian is a powerful and extensible knowledge base that works on top of your local folder of plain text files

item.title: Flow
item.description: Feature rich event, group and time managment system

item.title: acreom
item.description: Local-first open-source markdown knowledge base

item.title: Story Architect
item.description: All in one screenwriting app

item.title: Alexandria
item.description: A minimalistic cross-platform eBook reader

item.title: CherryTree
item.description: A hierarchical note taking application, featuring rich text and syntax highlighting

item.title: Notes
item.description: Notes is an open source and cross-platform note-taking app that is both beautiful and powerful

item.title: Zenkit
item.description: Project Management, Processes, Communication, Scheduling, Documents, and Knowledge Sharing – all in one platform.

item.title: Mochi
item.description: Take notes and make flashcards using markdown, then study them using spaced repetition.

item.title: linked
item.description: Daily journaling without distraction
